title: AIIMS Jodhpur Notification 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for 02 Project Technical Support III Posts
description: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Jodhpur (AIIMS Jodhpur) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for 02 Project Technical Support III Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the B.Sc Nursing, GNM can grab this chance and apply for the AIIMS Jodhpur Notification 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. If you are looking for more, here is a list...
